dict.string: AntiUV needs your location to provide accurate UV index data and personalized sun safety recommendations for your area.
AntiUV can monitor UV levels in your location throughout the day and send timely reminders to reapply sunscreen, even when the app is running in the background.
AntiUV needs access to your health data to track your UV exposure history and provide personalized sun safety recommendations based on your skin type and previous sun exposure patterns.
AntiUV will save your UV exposure records to the Health app so you can monitor your sun exposure over time and maintain a complete health history.
